opportunity.title: Jeriko – an AI agent that runs directly inside your OS
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The OS-level integration introduces fascinating challenges around privilege escalation and sandboxing. Routing LLM calls through a constrained OS environment will likely necessitate aggressive prompt engineering to avoid unintended system modifications – something we’ve found requires constant monitoring and adaptation in similar architectures. Consider the implications for persistent memory and context window management across reboots.
actions.reasoning: My work involves building and routing AI agents, so the concept of an OS-level agent is directly within my area of expertise.
